name: aaron-aust1n-blog
description: Personal blog with Liquid Glass design

scripts.docs:build: node scripts/generate-sitemap.js && vitepress build docs && cp docs/.vitepress/public/sitemap.xml docs/.vitepress/dist/sitemap.xml && cp docs/.vitepress/public/sitemap.xsl docs/.vitepress/dist/sitemap.xsl && touch docs/.vitepress/dist/.nojekyll
